title: nauclea gilletii var. lancifolia
intro: Nauclea gilletii var. lancifolia, also known as the Lancifolia Nauclea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical regions of Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating diarrhea, and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its leaves or roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
